# HyperFrames Render MCP

HyperFrames Render MCP is a hosted remote MCP for HyperFrames.

Website: https://hyperframesrender.clauxel.com/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: HyperFrames
Type: MCP
Default plan: team
MCP endpoint: https://hyperframesrender.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://hyperframesrender.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.hyperframesrender/hyperframesrender-mcp
Tools: render_hyperframe_video, check_render_status, fetch_render_artifact, export_render_receipt

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
